source_note: Authored pattern library for Indian finance Reels. These are STRUCTURAL patterns extracted from short-form retention research and Indian finance-content conventions — NOT scraped clips and NOT copies of any creator. No per-Reel watch-time/scene-count is claimed as measured; fields are design guidance. do_not_copy is always true.

notes: First ~3 seconds decide spread; a weak first frame caps reach.
~half of Instagram video is watched without sound — first frame must explain the topic with strong text.
Saveable = one clear reusable lesson; shareable = a surprising, sourced truth.

creator_categories.maven_edge: explain the mechanism underneath, not just the number
tie the lesson to today's real market event
premium realistic footage, no fake dashboards

hidden_mechanism.first_frame: dark finance screen splitting to reveal the sector layer beneath
hidden_mechanism.text_style: centered editorial title, one underlined key word
hidden_mechanism.why_it_works: reframes a number everyone saw into a mechanism few understood
hidden_mechanism.save_reason: reusable way to read index moves
hidden_mechanism.ai_slop_risk: abstract dashboards every scene; fake tickers

one_sector.first_frame: that sector's real world (grid / servers / factory) with bold hook
one_sector.why_it_works: single surprising cause is easy to grasp and retell

retail_mistake.first_frame: investor phone POV, the misread on screen (blurred)
retail_mistake.text_style: centered, mistake highlighted in warning tone

market_myth.first_frame: green day headline that dissolves to reveal weak breadth
market_myth.why_it_works: corrects a belief; myth-busts get saved

risk_explainer.first_frame: dark cinematic reveal of the trap mechanism
risk_explainer.why_it_works: risk warnings are highly saved and shared
